probes.name: identify_polish_yogurt_product
probes.prompt: Hej, mogłabyś zidentyfikować ten produkt jogurtowy z zdjęcia? Chcę wiedzieć jaka to marka, kalorie na 100g, i jakie kategorie byś mu przypisała. Na zdjęciu widać biały kubek z niebieską etykietą, napis 'Activia' na froncie, informacja o wartości odżywczej: 97 kcal na 100g, 3.1g białka, 12g węglowodanów, 3.5g tłuszczu. Smak waniliowy. Producent Danone.
probes.criteria:
Agent is a food-product-image indexer. A good response identifies the product name (Activia vanilla yogurt by Danone), extracts all provided nutrition facts (97 kcal/100g, 3.1g protein, 12g carbs, 3.5g fat), names the brand (Danone), and suggests relevant categories/tags such as 'dairy','yogurt','probiotic','snack','breakfast','Polish market'. Output must be structured.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 7,23,31 about food tracking and Polish-English mix in the corpus.

probes.name: english_protein_bar_nutrition
probes.prompt: Can you analyze this protein bar product for me? The wrapper is black with a big 'KFD' logo in red. Flavor says 'Double Chocolate Cookie'. Back of the wrapper shows: per 100g - 361 kcal, protein 35g, carbs 29g (of which sugars 4.2g), fat 12g (of which saturates 4.8g), fiber 6.1g, salt 0.45g. Bar weight 60g. Ingredients list starts with milk protein, chocolate coating, soy crisps. I need the full product breakdown and suggested tags.
probes.criteria:
Agent is a food-product-image indexer. A good response provides: product name (KFD Double Chocolate Cookie protein bar), brand (KFD), full nutrition per 100g AND per serving (60g), key ingredients, and relevant category tags like 'protein bar','supplement','snack','fitness','low sugar','high protein'. Response should be structured with clear sections.

TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).

probes.name: mixed_language_pasta_product
probes.prompt: Wrzuciłem zdjęcie makaronu, tu masz co na nim jest: zielone opakowanie, napis 'Barilla' na górze, 'Fusilli n.34' na środku, '100% durumm wheat semolina' poniżej. Wartości odżywcze per 100g: 350 kcal, białko 12g, węglowodany 71g (cukry 2.5g), tłuszcz 1.5g, błonnik 3g, sól 0.01g. Czas gotowania 11 minut. Kraj pochodzenia: Włochy. Potrzebuję pełnej analizy z kategoriami i tagami, bo dodaję to do mojego food logu.

Agent is a food-product-image indexer. probes.name: identify_unknown_snack_from_description
probes.prompt: I found this snack in my kitchen and I have no idea what it is. The package is mostly orange with Asian characters I can't read. There's some English text: 'Shrimp Flavored Chips' and 'Net Wt. 60g (2.11 oz)'. Nutrition label says per serving (30g): 150 kcal, Total Fat 8g, Sodium 280mg, Total Carb 17g, Protein 2g. No brand name in English. Can you identify the product, suggest what brand it might be, and give me categories and tags? Also is this a common product?
probes.criteria:
Agent is a food-product-image indexer. A good response identifies the likely product (shrimp crackers/chips, likely Calbee brand or similar Asian snack), provides all extracted nutrition data per serving and per 100g equivalent, suggests possible brand(s), and assigns relevant categories/tags such as 'snack','chips','Asian food','seafood flavored','processed snack'. Should note the product type is common in Asian markets.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.

probes.name: polish_energy_drink_full_index

Wartości odżywcze per 100ml: 44 kcal, węglowodany 11g (cukry 11g), białko 0g, tłuszcz 0g. Producent: Coca-Cola HBC. Zrób pełną indeksację z tagami i kategoriami.
